title: Indigo Pack
description: Bring Indigo Park-themed items to Minecraft!
body:
Thanks to the help of some friends, we've created a small texture pack that replaces some items with assets from the indie game Indigo Park. Most music discs have also been replaced with Chapter 1's OST.

What this pack changes:
- Sweet berries are Rambleberries
- Glow berries are Golden Rambleberries
- Totem of Undying
- Various Music discs are replaced with Indigo Park Chapter 1's OST
- Elytra is Mollie Wings
- Replaced Potion of Healing with "Rambleberry Juice"
- Fire Resistance potions are now labeled as "Golden Rambleberry Juice"
- The "experienced kinetic energy" death message has been replaced with "has barnstormed."
- Parrots are now retextured to look like Mollie Macaw. (Texture by @RigNinja59YT)
- Custom Rambley the Raccoon model for the foxes. (Model made by @brookeisdumb)
- Music Disc 13 is now Luigi's Casino music
